ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price of the asset */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price of the asset */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed */,
  "volume_currency" REAL /* Volume traded in currency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datetime", "asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., currency, stock, commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technical indicator */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being analyzed */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the indicator value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period used to calculate the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "asset_id", "datetime")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_data" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color used to represent the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id", "datetime")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout, view chart) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., day trading, swing trading, scalping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_rules" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the rule (e.g., MA crossover, RSI divergence) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to take when the condition is met (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "param1" TEXT /* Parameter 1 for the rule */,
  "param2" TEXT /* Parameter 2 for the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id", "rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the strategy during the backtest period */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the backtest period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the strategy during the simulation period */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the simulation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., earnings, economic indicators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., earnings, economic indicators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_assets" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchlist */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being added */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id", "asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who opened the position */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the position was opened */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit or loss generated by the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the portfolio */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the portfolio */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the risk metric */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at risk (VaR) of the user's portfolio */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* Expected shortfall (ES) of the user's portfolio */,
  "condition_value_at_risk" REAL /* Conditional value at risk (CVaR) of the user's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
